name: PT Pembangunan Graha Lestari Indah Tbk
summary: PT Pembangunan Graha Lestari Indah Tbk engages in the hotel and restaurant businesses in Indonesia. The company owns and operates a hotel under the Travellers Suites name; restaurants under the Le Chic name; and a banquet and restaurant under the Tia Caf√É¬© name. It also generates hydroelectricity power. PT Pembangunan Graha Lestari Indah Tbk was founded in 1994 and is based in Medan, Indonesia.
